name: Holmberg Park
description: (8) dedicated courts with in-ground nets with tight spacing between sidelines. While it's exciting to have the first public court complex in Spokane, this park might best fit players that are less mobile as running onto the sidelines of other courts is a very high possibility with only 5' of separation.
